Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants me to analyze an event log against a normative process description I need to identify which cases deviate from the expected flow and explain the violations based on the rules provided

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Normative Process Description Start Always begins with Receive order Next Step Check inventory must occur before any decisions about payment or fulfillment are made Path 1 Sufficient Inventory Fulfillment Path Sequence Receive Check Authorize payment Package items Ship order Close order Constraints Ordering Authorize payment AFTER Check inventory BEFORE Package items Package items AFTER Authorize payment BEFORE Ship order Ship order AFTER Package items Close order is FINAL No cancellation activities in this path Path 2 Insufficient Inventory Cancellation Path Sequence Receive Check Cancel order Close order Constraints After Cancel order do NOT proceed to fulfillment activities Package Ship Next step after Cancel is Close Close order is FINAL General Constraints Authorize payment only after Check inventory and before packaging Package items only after authorization and before shipping Ship order only after packaging and never after cancellation Close order must be final Any deviation equals violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Sequence Receive Check Authorize payment Package items Ship order Close order Check against norms Matches the fulfillment path exactly All ordering constraints satisfied Close is last Verdict Compliant

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Sequence Receive Check Package items Authorize payment Ship order Close order Check against norms Package items occurs before Authorize payment The norm says Package items should only occur after authorization and before shipping Also Authorize payment should be before packaging Violation Packaging happens before payment authorization Verdict Non compliant

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Sequence Receive Check Authorize payment Cancel order Ship order Close order Check against norms After Cancel order the process should go directly to Close order However Ship order occurs after cancellation The norm explicitly states Ship order should only occur after packaging and never after a cancellation Also fulfillment activities should not follow cancellation Violation Shipping occurs after cancellation Verdict Non compliant

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 4 Sequence Receive Check Cancel order Close order Check against norms Matches the cancellation path exactly Receive Check Cancel Close Close is final No extra activities Verdict Compliant

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 5 Sequence Receive Check Authorize payment Ship order Close order Check against norms The fulfillment path requires Receive Check Authorize payment Package items Ship order Close order Case 5 skips Package items The norm says Package items should occur after authorization and before shipping Violation Missing Package items step Shipping occurs without prior packaging Verdict Non compliant

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Synthesize Findings and Structure Output List each case State whether it complies or violates Explain the specific violation based on the text Reference the exact constraints from the prompt Keep it clear and structured

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Case 3 also has Authorize payment before Cancel order which is fine but the norm says if inventory is insufficient it goes straight to cancel The log shows it authorized payment first then canceled I will focus on the explicit violation shipping after cancellation which is strictly forbidden I can also mention the unnecessary payment authorization if inventory was already known to be insufficient

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self Correction Verification during thought Case 5 Is skipping Package items a violation Yes the norm says the sequence should include it Only after items have been properly packaged is it appropriate to proceed with Ship order Skipping it violates the explicit ordering constraint Case 3 The explicit violation is shipping after cancel All cases checked
